title: "BATproject: does not match always" on abusive use of ALTER TABLE SET READ ONLY
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT, created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, name) VALUES (1, 'Test Entry');
UPDATE test_table SET name = 'Read Only' WHERE id = 1;
key_bug_features: ALTER TABLE SET READ ONLY on existing tables
